codeReview.summary: The change stays tightly scoped to the perf guardrail harness: it precomputes the 2000-item synthetic fixtures once, replaces slower user-event-driven filter setup with deterministic button actions, and splits the previous timeout-prone monolithic VAL-PERF-001 assertion into three smaller cases that still cover scroll, filter, and cross-column move behavior. The production ModLibraryColumn code is untouched, while the preserved assertions still fail loudly if rendered row counts exceed the DOM cap in any of the exercised phases.

summary: Pass. The timeout fix preserves the original virtualization regression coverage while making the guardrail deterministic enough to stay comfortably under Vitest's per-test timeout in isolated, package, and root test runs.
